specific_mechanism: Brief intense heat source charges thermal mass; passive slow radiation amortizes the energy over hours.
llm_application: ONDOL-LLM: a deep-prefill 'burn' computes shared-prefix activations into a thermal-mass KV cache; subsequent queries amortize over the cache without re-paying prefix compute; eviction is staggered.
novelty_claim: Prefix-cache and shared-prefix KV reuse are published techniques (vLLM, SGLang). The 'thermal-mass' framing is metaphor — operational mechanism is well-known.
